answer: The data flow for the Discussions feature is: 1) The Discussion type (src/types/discussion.ts) defines the shape: id, title, content, authorId, createdAt. 2) DiscussionService.fetchDiscussions() calls apiClient.get('/discussions') which returns Discussion[]. 3) DiscussionList mounts, useEffect fires, calls fetchDiscussions().then(setDiscussions) to store the array in component state. 4) DiscussionList renders a <ul> with <li> per discussion showing d.title and d.content. The entire chain: type definition → service function → HTTP transport → component state → JSX render.

ranked_files.reason: Defines the Discussion data shape that flows through the entire chain
fetchDiscussions fetches and types the API response as Discussion[]
Holds discussions in state and renders them
Transport layer that makes the actual HTTP call

evidence.note: Discussion interface with id, title, content, authorId, createdAt
fetchDiscussions returns apiClient.get('/discussions') typed as Discussion[]
Renders <li> per discussion showing title and content
